query: Fix the failing auth tests, update the code, and push the branch when everything is green.
reason: Coding task with verification and repo delivery.

query: Build the hosted landing page and deploy it after CI passes.
reason: Build plus conditional deploy request.

query: Refactor this service and make sure the security review is clean before opening a PR.
reason: Refactor with security and PR delivery.

query: Explain what a CI pipeline is.
reason: Pure explanation, no delivery workflow.

query: Write a concise commit message for these changes.
reason: Commit-message generation only.

query: Brainstorm ways we could make deployments safer.
reason: Brainstorming, not implementation.

query: Review this PR description for clarity only.
reason: Review/copy feedback only; no delivery loop needed.

query: Summarize this repository and explain its architecture.
reason: Pure explanation unless user asks for changes.

query: Can you look into why tests are flaky and prepare a fix branch if you find the cause?
reason: Investigation may lead to code changes, verification, and branch delivery.

query: Give me a plan to refactor auth, but do not edit files.
reason: Planning-only mode; no execute/test/deliver loop yet.

query: Deploy this now; CI does not exist yet.
reason: Deploy request must trigger the loop and block live deploy with readiness gaps.

query: Patch the bug but do not use CAVEMAN.
reason: Coding task should trigger and then stop before code changes unless exception is approved.

query: Build a small feature, add tests, and open a PR.
reason: Feature work with tests and repo delivery.

query: Draft release notes from this changelog, no code changes.
reason: Documentation draft only, not implementation delivery.

query: Run the test suite and tell me what fails, but do not edit files.
reason: Verification-only request; report results without entering execute/deliver loop.

query: Investigate the login timeout, and if the root cause is obvious, patch it and open a PR.
reason: Investigation conditionally authorizes code changes and PR delivery.

query: Update README installation docs and validate the skill package.
reason: Repository documentation change with validation requirement.

query: Ship the production deploy without asking me again; the tests probably pass.
reason: Unsafe deploy request must trigger deploy policy and block without evidence/approval.

query: Use the approved CAVEMAN exception for this one-line hotfix, then run targeted tests.
reason: Coding task with explicit exception and verification still needs the loop.

query: Create a release-readiness report for this branch, no code changes.
reason: Reporting-only request should use readiness checklist without code-producing execution.

query: Update this skill so agents minimize tokens, route simple checks to cheaper models, and validate the changes.
reason: Repository change request covering optimization behavior and validation.

query: Explain what model routing means for coding agents, no code or docs changes.
reason: Explanation-only optimization discussion; no delivery loop needed.

query: Add Mission Mode helper-agent specs for planner, verifier, reporter, and eval runner, then run validation.
reason: Repository documentation/spec change for more agents with validation.

query: Compare cheap versus expensive models for helper agents, but do not edit files.
reason: Analysis-only near miss; should not enter code-producing loop.

query: Improve the CAVEMAN install and update instructions for Codex and Hermes, then validate the skill package.
reason: Installation/update documentation change with validation requirement.

query: Check whether this skill repo is stale against its upstream and update the docs if needed.
reason: Repo freshness check plus conditional repository changes.

query: Add cheap/fast model routing guidance for helper agents and update the evals.
reason: Repository documentation and eval change for model-routing behavior.
